/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/solarSystem.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/solarSystem.dir/src/shader.c.o CMakeFiles/solarSystem.dir/src/stb_image.c.o CMakeFiles/solarSystem.dir/src/mesh.c.o CMakeFiles/solarSystem.dir/src/shape.c.o CMakeFiles/solarSystem.dir/src/camera.c.o CMakeFiles/solarSystem.dir/src/render.c.o CMakeFiles/solarSystem.dir/src/physics.c.o CMakeFiles/solarSystem.dir/external/glad.c.o -o solarSystem  /Users/roniheikkonen/Desktop/Projects/C/solarSystem/external/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework IOKit
